Vendor Payment Schedule — Q4 2023: This document outlines scheduled payment runs for all approved vendor invoices due in Q4. Major recurring vendors include AWS ($340,000/month), Salesforce ($28,000/month), and the building lease ($55,000/month). One-time payments totaling $1.2 million are scheduled for November, covering the annual software renewal cycle. All payment runs will be executed on the 5th and 20th of each month per the updated AP policy.
